description: Vaivora weapon effect data for all Wizard tree classes. Level 1 = base Vaivora, Level 4 = max enhancement.

design_patterns.linear_proficiency: Buffs existing rotation without changing rotation shape. Pure damage amplification or CD reduction.
design_patterns.gap_filling: Adds damage sources during CD gaps, creates persistent AoE, or generates passive proc damage.

additional_effects: Demon Scratch has 50% chance to create Invocation Evil Spirit

design_analysis.reasoning: Provides passive DPS during CD gaps via auto-firing Demonische proc AND accelerates spirit generation via Demon Scratch 50% spirit creation.

passive_bonuses: Annihilate effect added to Elemental Burst

proc_mechanic.name: Annihilate
effects: Fire Annihilate Ray to the front
Maximum number of targets 20, Number of hits 6
Cannot hit repeated against the same target
Property determined by highest skill-level sum: Fire (Fire Claw + Meteor), Ice (Hail + Blizzard Storm), Lightning (Electrocute + Lightning Orb)
Only calculated by invested skill points
Annihilate is not considered as casting
Annihilate Damage: 4% of current level Elemental Burst × Skill Level Sum

level_4_effect.description: Following effect applies according to the property of your highest Elementalist skill-level sum: Fire = Fire Claw FD +100%, Ice = Blizzard Storm FD +100%, Lightning = Lightning Orbs hit twice.

design_analysis.reasoning: Appends free Annihilate ray on Elemental Burst (not considered casting = can overlap). Damage scales with total invested skill levels, rewarding full Elementalist commitment.

proc_mechanic.name: Biased Gravity
effects: Immune to Knockback, Knockdown while casting Gravity Pole
Strikes in fan shape range per every 1 second while casting Gravity Pole
Damages by 50% of Gravity Pole skill factor in current level
Pulls the target little per strike if target is monster
Additionally strikes in round range when Gravity Pole channeling is end
Hits 5 times with Gravity Pole skill factor of current level
Maximum targets: 20
Biased Gravity is not considered as channeling

design_analysis.reasoning: Turns Gravity Pole channel into an offensive AoE pull (fan strikes during + 5-hit burst at end). Not counted as channeling = doesn't lock out other actions.

proc_mechanic.name: Blood Butterfly
effects: Create a [Blood Butterfly's Territory] around yourself
Enemy within territory receives damage equal to skill factor of Ngadhundi every 2 seconds
Cooldown of Featherfoot skill decreases by 1 second when enemy within territory is defeated by your attack

design_analysis.reasoning: Creates persistent AoE damage zone during Curse of Blood. Passive Ngadhundi-level ticks every 2s + kill-based CD reduction. Classic gap-filler.

skill_level_bonuses: Number of consecutive hits of Shadow Thorn +1

proc_mechanic.name: Diffuse Reflection
effects: Shadow Thorn gives damage to maximum 5 targets nearby

design_analysis.reasoning: Buffs Shadow Thorn (more hits, AoE splash) + reduces Shadow Condensation CD. Direct amplification without new mechanics.

proc_mechanic.name: Distortion
proc_mechanic.trigger: Casting Hole of Darkness / Using Micro Dimension
effects: Apply [Distorted Space] debuff for 10 seconds on max 10 enemies within selected area when casting Hole of Darkness
Give Non-property magic damage to target under [Distorted Space] debuff within 400 range when using Micro Dimension
Divides 35% of Hole of Darkness at current level into 6 times and hit
Distortion is not judged as casting

design_analysis.reasoning: Creates debuff on Hole of Darkness targets, then Micro Dimension triggers bonus hits (35% HoD SFR × 6) on debuffed targets. Cross-skill synergy fills gaps.

proc_mechanic.name: Electric Flow
effects: Delete the effect that removes [Current] debuff of Lightning Spear
Fire additional Lightning Spear to 5 targets around the currently aimed target
Additionally fired Lightning Spear attacks a single target

level_4_effect.description: Increases Static Field Final damage by +100%

design_analysis.reasoning: Removes [Current] removal penalty + AoE splash on Lightning Spear. Direct upgrade to existing skill behavior.

proc_mechanic.name: Fire Bolt
effects: Descend meteor to a random enemy nearby Fire Pillar
Meteor Fall cycle is equal to the cycle of Fire Pillar
The Meteor is considered as the same skill with Fire Pillar

design_analysis.reasoning: Fire Pillar passively drops meteors on nearby enemies at its tick rate. Free damage during other casts. Classic gap-filler.

proc_mechanic.name: Icy Snow Bubble
effects: Create Icy Snow Bubble every 0.5 seconds when installing Frost Pillar
Damage of Icy Snow Bubble is equal to Frost Pillar
Icy Snow Bubble does not apply Freeze or Chill
This effect is not altered by item or skills related to casting

level_4_effect.description: Ice Bolt number of hits x2

design_analysis.reasoning: Frost Pillar passively spawns bubbles every 0.5s at pillar SFR. Persistent AoE during other casts. Similar pattern to Pyromancer's Fire Bolt.

passive_bonuses: Appearance and name of skeleton summons changed to Immortality
Basic attack of summoned monsters changed, skill attack added

proc_mechanic.name: Immortality
proc_mechanic.notes: Summon's skill is irrelevant to the character's skill. Necromancer Summon will be unsummoned when unequipping the item.

level_4_effect.description: Increases the additional stat of Necromancer Summon (STR, INT, CON), Summoner's SPR +20%

design_analysis.reasoning: Transforms basic-attack summons into skill-using AI companions. Summons deal damage independently during all dead time. Massive gap-fill for a summoner class.

proc_mechanic.name: Lewa Advent
effects: Apply [Lewa Advent] for 5 seconds to target when casting Damballa
Number of Dark Force stacks during [Lewa Advent] debuff duration +1
Additionally hit target by 75% of Damballa Skill Factor × 4 times after [Lewa Advent] debuff duration
Damage of additional hit increases by 20% per debuff cast by Bokor applied to the target (Maximum 60%)

design_analysis.reasoning: Delayed burst after Damballa debuff expires (75% SFR × 4 hits, scaling with debuff count up to +60%). Rewards full debuff rotation before burst.

passive_bonuses: Howling White Tiger Number of hits +3

proc_mechanic.name: Red Tiger Claw
effects: Apply weak debuff when Howling White Tiger accurately hits
Debuff duration: 5 seconds
Damage increased when the caster gives damage to the debuff target by Onmyoji skill by +100%
Debuff effect not applied when removing Red Tiger Claw item

design_analysis.reasoning: Howling White Tiger applies +100% damage debuff for 5s. All subsequent Onmyoji skills deal double damage in that window. Massive burst amplifier.

proc_mechanic.name: Rune of Vigilance
proc_mechanic.trigger: Rune Caster skills / Rune of Rock
effects: Changes [Rune Caster: Casting] buff to maximum 5 stacks
Damage by Rune caster skill per [Rune Caster: Casting] stack +20%
When 5 [Rune Caster: Casting] is stacked and Rune of Rock is cast, consume 3 stacks of [Rune Caster: Casting] and reset Cooldown of Rune of Rock

design_analysis.reasoning: Stack-based damage ramping (+20% per stack, up to 5) with CD reset mechanic on Rune of Rock at max stacks. Rewards continuous casting.

proc_mechanic.name: Stone-Slinger
proc_mechanic.trigger: Sand Blast hits / Sand Blast critical hit
effects: Casts Stone Shower equal to caster's current level when critical hit occurs for Sand Blast
When it's not critically hit, Stone Shower is cast by 15% chance when Sand Blast is hit

level_4_effect.description: Horn of Golem number of hits +3

design_analysis.reasoning: Sand Blast triggers free Stone Shower casts (100% on crit, 15% otherwise). Generates bonus damage passively during normal rotation.

proc_mechanic.name: Time Rush
effects: Damage dealt increased by Quick Cast skill level × 3.5% during Quick Cast

level_4_effect.description: Cast [Time Clutch] to the designated location when casting Slow. When casting an attack skill that shows its effect after casting is completely over, Slow Cooldown decreases as much as the skill's original casting time. Time Clutch: Non-property Magic Damage at designated 60 range. Skill Factor: Slow Skill level × 400% × 2 times. Maximum Target: 10. Silence Target for 2 seconds.

design_analysis.reasoning: Quick Cast becomes a damage steroid (skill level × 3.5% bonus). Level 4 adds Time Clutch AoE on Slow + CD reduction mechanic. Utility class gains damage.

proc_mechanic.name: Vigilant Charm
effects: Apply Vigilant Charm effect to Taoist Rank 1 skills
Flame Radiation Charm: Number of hit x2
Creeping Death Charm: Range increases, Number of hits x2
Divine Punishment: Broad Strike constantly active, Damage in proportion to casting applied as maximum at all times, Number of hits x2
When Vigilant Charm activates, awakening effect maintains as much as the cooldown of the skill
Awakening effect of other skills is not activated during this awakening effect

level_4_effect.description: Following effects applied during the skill's awakening effect: Flame Radiation Charm = Increases Fire Charm Final Damage by 100%. Creeping Death Charm = Increases Snow Tempest Charm Final Damage by 100%. Divine Punishment = Increases Eradication Final Damage by 100%.

design_analysis.reasoning: Doubles hits on all Rank 1 Taoist skills + activates permanent awakening during cooldown windows. Level 4 adds conditional +100% FD to paired skills. Massive amplification of existing kit.

proc_mechanic.name: Wicked Desire
effects: The devil of the secondary card remains after using Evocation
Summon skills automatically used, Unmountable
Duration: 10 seconds

design_analysis.reasoning: Secondary card devil persists after Evocation for 10s, auto-using summon skills. Adds autonomous pet damage during cooldowns.
